filters.rule: Exclude prompts whose explicit market/event date or metadata endDate is expired or within the freshness horizon.

promptMix.rationale: Natural buyer prompts exercise implicit chart-worthy runtime behavior; explicit chart prompts teach first-time users that direct chart requests are supported.

candidates.prompt: Who are the top 10 holders of Yes on the 'Will Jon Stewart win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?' market, what is their combined share, and is concentration bullish or bearish? Create a bar chart ranking the relevant outcomes/entities for Will Jon Stewart win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination? (market: will-jon-stewart-win-the-2028-democratic-presidential-nomination-518). Plot the primary buyer-relevant metric on the y-axis, use human-readable labels on the x-axis, and include a short buyer takeaway.
